aries:
♈ Aries

❤️ Love: Argument avoid karne ke liye calm rehna hoga

💰 Money: Sudden expense ka signal hai

🧘 Advice: Speed ko control karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Har fast move progress nahi hota
